note: Capability evidence (sample_param_values/inspiration_tags/topics) reflects what each template has actually generated, which is broader than its description. Use this — not the description alone — to label routing ground truth.

sample_param_values: Tyrannosaurus Rex — apex predator of the Late Cretaceous, 12m long, 40 km/h, bite force 12,800 lb

Stegosaurus — Jurassic plated herbivore, thagomizer tail spikes, double row of bony back plates, walnut-sized brain
Velociraptor — small Late Cretaceous pack hunter, feathered, sickle claw, intelligent, 2m long
Brachiosaurus — Jurassic long-necked herbivore, reached 12m tall to feed on treetops, weighed 50 tons
Spinosaurus — semi-aquatic Cretaceous carnivore, sail-back, longer than T-Rex, swam and hunted fish in rivers
Allosaurus — Late Jurassic apex predator before T-Rex, slashing teeth, hunted in groups, 8.5m long
Pteranodon — Late Cretaceous flying reptile (technically a pterosaur, not a dinosaur), 7m wingspan, fished from the sky
Ankylosaurus — Late Cretaceous armored herbivore, club-tailed, low and tank-like, fused bone armor across back
Parasaurolophus — Late Cretaceous duck-billed herbivore, hollow crest amplified honking calls, 10m long

templates.description: Generate exquisite traditional Chinese ink wash paintings inspired by classic ancient poems — capturing the mood, imagery, and beauty of each verse.
sample_param_values: 登鹳雀楼 白日依山尽，黄河入海流。 欲穷千里目，更上一层楼。 ——王之涣
静夜思 床前明月光，疑是地上霜。 举头望明月，低头思故乡。 ——李白
江雪 千山鸟飞绝，万径人踪灭。 孤舟蓑笠翁，独钓寒江雪。 ——柳宗元
寻隐者不遇 松下问童子，言师采药去。 只在此山中，云深不知处。 ——贾岛
枫桥夜泊 月落乌啼霜满天，江枫渔火对愁眠。 姑苏城外寒山寺，夜半钟声到客船。 ——张继
山行 远上寒山石径斜，白云深处有人家。 停车坐爱枫林晚，霜叶红于二月花。 ——杜牧
春晓 春眠不觉晓，处处闻啼鸟。 夜来风雨声，花落知多少。 ——孟浩然
钱塘湖春行 孤山寺北贾亭西，水面初平云脚低。 几处早莺争暖树，谁家新燕啄春泥。 乱花渐欲迷人眼，浅草才能没马蹄。 最爱湖东行不足，绿杨阴里白沙堤。 ——白居易

Central forward-sprint dribbling figure in authentic national kit, surrounded by monochrome blue ink-engraving comic panels showing career milestones — trophy hoisting, classic goals, championship celebrations. Aged cream parchment background, vintage western sports manga aesthetic.
search_aliases: 克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多

templates.title: All-Sports Tournament Schedule Infographic
templates.description: Vertical formal tournament schedule infographic. Top banner with event title + athlete portraits + championship trophy. Middle: group standings + match schedule in segmented blocks. Bottom: chronological knockout bracket with match dates. Supports realistic / cartoon / minimalist art styles.
sample_param_values: fifa world cup 2026 group draw poster
fifa world cup 2026 round of 32 prediction poster
2026 World Cup Schedule Interpretation: Core Impact of Format Changes on Match Arrangements
Schedule of Popular Teams in 2026 World Cup: Group Stage Fixtures of Argentina, Brazil, France, etc.
2026 World Cup Group Stage Schedule: Match Time, Fixtures & Core Highlights of Each Group
Key Schedule Nodes of 2026 World Cup: Opening Match, Knockout Stage, Final Time & Venues

templates.title: Universal Multi-Country Split Schedule Flyer Poster
templates.description: Vertical decorative event schedule poster for multi-region / multi-country tournaments. Top: trophy + bold headline. Middle: vertical equal columns per host region with date, venue, guest portraits, opening fixture. Bottom: producer info + fact text. Vibrant folk decorative aesthetic.

templates.title: Nano Banana Prompt: Global City Walkability Infographic Card Generator | Curify AI
templates.description: Generate a grid-layout walkability infographic poster for any list of global cities — flags, landmark photos, walkability scores, and pedestrian-first urban design highlights.
sample_param_values: Top walkable European capitals: Copenhagen Denmark, Amsterdam Netherlands, Paris France, Zurich Switzerland — pedestrian-first urban design across Europe
Most walkable Asian metropolises: Tokyo Japan, Singapore, Seoul Korea, Hong Kong China — dense urban cores with world-class transit
Most walkable American cities: New York City, San Francisco, Boston, Chicago — North American urban walkability leaders

templates.title: Nano Banana Prompt: Sports Team MBTI Character Card Poster Generator | Curify AI
